## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12

### 📷 Cameras
- Keeps the default camera live view path on the stable X-Sense stream source for all camera models.
- Adds an options-flow setting for an experimental X-Sense WebRTC bridge without changing the default camera behavior.
- Keeps motion and AI notification events on the Home Assistant event entity path used by the included blueprint.

### 🧪 Experimental WebRTC Bridge
- Adds a local Pion-based bridge for testing the APK-style X-Sense WebRTC signaling flow.
- Aligns the experimental signaling path with the APK sequence for tickets, peer matching, ICE candidates, SDP answers, data channel setup, and `startLive`.
- Enables X-Sense integration debug logging automatically while the experimental bridge option is selected.

### 🔔 Blueprint
- Fixes the camera event blueprint trigger schema so Home Assistant receives the required `event.received` options.
- Keeps the blueprint UI focused on selecting the camera event entity instead of a separate event type selector.

### 📚 Documentation
- Updates the camera live view, notification, and troubleshooting/support text across all language README files so they describe the stable stream source default and the experimental WebRTC bridge accurately.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the stable default camera path, the experimental bridge option, APK-shaped signaling payloads, bridge session requests, debug logging, and blueprint trigger options.
- Confirms the full Python test suite and the Go bridge test/build pass with these changes.
